common.tagline: Your second brain — as an MCP server

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Sign in to your second brain.

setup.title: Welcome to Mnela
setup.subtitle: Six steps to bootstrap your second brain.

admin.title: Create your admin account
admin.description: This is the only login that can change configuration.
admin.passwordHint: 12+ characters. Use a passphrase you can remember.

claude.title: Claude Code
claude.description: Mnela uses your Claude Max subscription via the Claude Code CLI on the server. Pick what fits.
claude.haveMax: I have Claude Max — set it up now
claude.haveMaxDescription: We'll show you how to run claude login on the server.
claude.laterDescription: Use Mnela in Dumb Mode (FTS-only). You can enable Claude later.
claude.neverDescription: Mnela will work as a smart Obsidian replacement, no AI enrichment.
claude.instructions: Run this on your server, then return here:

modules.title: Optional modules
modules.description: Modules run as additional containers and need extra resources. You can toggle these later.
modules.voiceDescription: Run whisper.cpp container for audio uploads.
modules.voiceWarning: Needs the optional compose profile: `docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker/docker-compose.optional.yml --profile optional up -d whisper`. Without it audio uploads still work — they stay at status='raw' and you can backfill via POST /system/transcribe-pending later.

import.title: Import your existing knowledge
import.description: Drop a ChatGPT export ZIP, Claude.ai export, Obsidian vault, or any supported file. Or skip and import later.

token.title: Your first API token
token.description: Save this token now — we won't show it again. Use it to connect Claude Code on your laptop.
token.name: Token name
token.snippet: Add this MCP server to Claude Code:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: What's happening in your second brain.

audio.transcriptEmpty: No transcript yet. Click Re-transcribe once whisper is reachable.
audio.whisperUnavailable: Whisper container is not reachable. Start it with the optional compose profile.
audio.awaitingTranscription: This recording has not been transcribed yet. Enable whisper or run /system/transcribe-pending.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group documents, decisions, and entities under shared context.
projects.name: Name
projects.refreshUnavailable: Claude orchestrator is not reachable. Start it to refresh project context.
projects.noContext: No context yet. Run "Refresh context" once Claude is available.
projects.noEntities: No entities surfaced yet — enrich some documents in this project first.
projects.noQuestions: No open questions in metadata yet. Add them via PATCH /projects/:slug with metadata.openQuestions.

newPage.title: New project
newPage.subtitle: Pick a system suggestion or start from scratch.
newPage.suggestionsEmpty: No suggestions yet. Click rescan to scan your imports + entity graph.
newPage.suggestionsDisabled: Project suggestions are disabled in admin. Enable them under System → Projects to populate this list.
newPage.autoFillHint: Runs a background scan that links documents matching your description (linkSource=autoFill).

detail.summaryFallback: No summary yet. Run "Refresh context" once Claude is available.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.subtitle: ADR-style log of choices and trade-offs.

imports.title: Imports
imports.subtitle: Bulk uploads of exports and folders.

newPage.title: New import
newPage.description: Drop ZIP exports or supported files. We'll parse them in the background.
newPage.drop: Drop files here, or click to browse

detail.fallbackBanner: Live updates unavailable — falling back to polling.

input.hint: Enter to send · Cmd+Enter for newline

composer.chatTooltip: Conversation only — files (if any) are read as context but nothing is added to the brain.
composer.chatHint: Just a question — files are temporary context, nothing is stored in the brain.
composer.ingestTooltip: Save the Q&A + any attached files into the knowledge graph. Files run through the same ingestion pipeline as /imports.
composer.ingestHint: Q&A + uploaded files become Documents and enrich the graph — visible in /graph and /jobs in a minute.
composer.waitForUploads: Waiting for attachments to finish uploading…

empty.title: Ask anything
empty.subtitle: Your answer streams back with citation chips for every source note.
empty.examples: Try "What did I decide about Postgres FTS?" or "Summarize my Linear ideas from the last month".

dumbMode.banner: AI Smart Mode disabled — showing keyword search results only.

rateLimit.banner: Claude rate limit reached. Resumes at {resetAt}.

memorySidebar.empty: The brain hasn't been fed yet.
memorySidebar.emptyHint: Switch the composer to "Feed brain" to save a Q&A and any attached files here.

error.generic: The assistant couldn't answer right now. Try again in a moment — your question wasn't lost. If this keeps happening, check the server logs.
error.auth: The assistant is signed out. An administrator needs to sign it in on the server.
error.noBinary: The assistant isn't installed on this server. An administrator needs to install Claude Code.
error.rateLimit: Rate limit reached for the assistant. Wait for the window to reset, then try again.
error.timeout: The assistant went quiet for too long. The request was cancelled — please try again.

save.dialogSubtitle: Creates a new Document (type=synthesis) with this answer and its citations.

cmdk.compactHint: ⌘K toggles · ↑↓ navigate · ↵ open · Tab to expand
cmdk.expandedHint: ↵ open · Esc collapse · Tab to compact
cmdk.expandedSubtitle: Full-text, fuzzy, hybrid — across documents and entities.
cmdk.moreDocuments: {count, plural, one {+# more document} other {+# more documents}}
cmdk.moreEntities: {count, plural, one {+# more entity} other {+# more entities}}

graph.title: Graph
graph.subtitle: Force-directed view across entities and edges.

search.pickCenter: Search to highlight · Enter to jump
search.hint: Enter to navigate · Esc to clear

overview.hint: Most connected entities · click any node to dive in

filters.title: Filters
filters.densityAllWarn: Loading all nodes may be slow on larger graphs.

create.title: New entity
create.subtitle: Add a node to your brain. If one with the same name + type already exists, you'll jump to it.
create.name: Name

entityPanel.emptyDescription: No description yet — click the pencil to add one.

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.description: Configure which AI backend powers Ask, enrichment, vision, and project-context. The built-in Claude Code CLI is always available; add API providers below.

ingestion.title: Ingestion
ingestion.description: Upload limits, ChatGPT/Claude.ai parser behaviour, and the ingest worker.

enrichment.title: Enrichment
enrichment.description: Pipeline throughput, rate-limit handling, and per-attachment vision settings.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Auto-suggested projects (ADR-0050). Turn the suggestion detector off to stop the post-import scan and avoid any token use. Default ON.

storage.title: Storage & Backup
storage.backupNote: Backup tooling is on the roadmap. For now, take regular `pg_dump`s of MNELA_DATA_DIR.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Worker concurrency and other low-level knobs.

errors.bytesParse: Could not parse "{value}" — try formats like "5GiB", "2 GB", or "1048576".

providers.title: AI Providers
providers.deleteConfirm: Delete provider "{name}"? Any feature still routed to it will fall back to providers.default.

routing.title: Routing
routing.subtitle: Each feature can route to a specific provider or fall back to the global default.

dialog.title: Add AI provider
dialog.description: Configure an Anthropic API or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Keys are encrypted at rest.
dialog.name: Name

tokens.title: API tokens
tokens.subtitle: MCP and CLI access.
tokens.name: Name
tokens.plaintextWarning: This is the only time the plaintext token is shown.

jobs.title: Job stats
jobs.subtitle: Throughput, durations, and error rates for background workers.
jobs.lastFailedSubtitle: Last 20 failed jobs — retry sends them back to the queue.

errors.serviceUnavailable: This feature lands in a later phase
errors.networkError: Network error — check the API is running

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Items waiting for review (entity merges, edge suggestions).
inbox.empty: Nothing to review. Suggestions arrive when Claude enriches your documents.
inbox.emptyHint: Try a wider date range or clear the filters above.

description.linkSuggestion: Claude proposed a connection between two entities. Review the relation and evidence before accepting.
description.entityMergeSuggestion: Two entities look like the same thing. Merge folds the source into the target.
description.duplicateDetection: Two documents share content. Mark which is canonical.
description.enrichmentFailed: Enrichment for this document failed. Retry or dismiss.
description.conflictingDecision: A new decision contradicts an existing one. Pick which stands.

bulk.confirmReject: Reject {count} item(s)? This can't be undone in a single click.

diff.noEvidence: Source document is no longer available

editForm.title: Edit before accept
editForm.noteOnMerge: Switch to the full merge view to change the target entity.

entityMerge.title: Merge entity
entityMerge.description: Fold one entity into another. Document mentions and edges repoint to the target. Self-loops and duplicate edges are removed.

preview.title: Preview impact
preview.ready: Preview ready — review counts and confirm.

error.selfMerge: Cannot merge an entity into itself

edgeEditor.title: Edit edge
edgeEditor.description: Change the relation type or status. Deletion removes the link entirely.
edgeEditor.deleteConfirm: Delete this edge? Click again to confirm.

reasons.notLoggedIn: Not logged in — run 'claude login' on the server
